title: The First Moment!
description: The time i first saw you!

title: The time we started talking flawlessly
description: It was such a great time. One I'll never forget.

title: The time we landed in Bengaluru from Vizag after a 1 hour flight
description: We were on 35B and 35C on 6E5309 on a Airbus A321 Neo

title: The First Message
description: The first message on Instagram 'Hey' and 'Hoiii hoiiii' and we exchanged numbers

title: The First Spotify Jam
description: Our first Spotify Jam!, you were on the way to Tumkur

title: The Endless Conversation
description: The first time you got angry on me for stalking, and the first time i told that 'I LIKE YOU' and we literaly kept talking like till 3:04 AM

title: The First of Many
description: This was the first day i spoke to you on a phone call. This was the first time i saw you in your traditional attire and you looked absolutely stunning. And that nose pin oh my god! Can't forgot!

title: The First Planned Meet
description: I cant forgot this day, we met at the airport (first planned meet), we ate at Go Pizza (funfact we wasted 2 slices). It was such a good day, this was the first time she gave me side hug which was truly truely special! And I was so sad to see her go back...

title: The Special Call
description: We were on a video call and you told me that it was more 2+ years since you were really happy and the past 13 days since we were talking you were seeing that old real natual smile of yours while talking to me, and it meant the world to me!

title: Things I'm Waiting To Do
description: Take a long, quiet vacation together somewhere beautiful.
